hyperedges.label: Low-Code/No-Code Service Offering Echoed Across Home, What-We-Do, Contact, and NAICS Pages
Ramon Aseniero Endorsed by Name in Both Client Testimonials
US Government Compliance Framing Aligned Across Code of Conduct and NAICS Pages
Enterprise Design System Synthesis (Sitecore + Fluent + Lightning)
Design Review Tooling Chain (principles + style guide + agent + invocation surfaces)

nodes.label: Client/Server Component Boundary Pattern
nodes.rationale: Most components under src/views, src/components/sections, and src/components/layout carry "use client" because the site is highly interactive (Radix, scroll animations, forms); the app/ route wrappers stay server components specifically so they can export metadata.

nodes.label: Per-Page Header/Footer Rendering Pattern
nodes.rationale: StickyHeader and Footer are rendered inside each page component rather than centralized in layout.tsx, in order to preserve the original per-page header behavior (alwaysVisible false on '/', true elsewhere).

nodes.label: SEO Metadata API & JSON-LD Organization Pattern
nodes.rationale: Per-page titles/descriptions via the Metadata API, JSON-LD Organization on the home route, and canonicals derived from metadataBase, chosen for SEO coverage across the App Router pages.
nodes.norm_label: seo metadata api & json-ld organization pattern
